mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_GROUP_NAME AS groupCodeName, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS modDate FROM tb_group_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{groupCode}), '%')
AND CODE_GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupCodeName}, '%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_code WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = tb_group_code.CODE_GROUP_ID AND CODE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%'))
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tb_detail_code WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = tb_group_code.CODE_GROUP_ID AND DETAIL_CODE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{detailCode}, '%'))
AND USE_YN = CASE WHEN #{useYn} = '사용' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
ORDER BY CODE_GROUP_ID
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_GROUP_NAME AS groupCodeName, USE_YN AS useYn FROM tb_group_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_group_code SET CODE_GROUP_NAME = #{groupCodeName}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, DEL_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM', MOD_DATE = NOW() WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_group_code WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode})
DELETE FROM tb_code WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode})
DELETE FROM tb_detail_code WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode})
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate FROM tb_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CODE_ID

SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn FROM tb_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_code SET CODE_NAME = #{codeName}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, DEL_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM', MOD_DATE = NOW() WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_code WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code})
DELETE FROM tb_detail_code WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code})
mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, DETAIL_CODE_ID AS detailCode, DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS detailCodeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate FROM tb_detail_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode})
AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code})
ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, DETAIL_CODE_ID

SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS groupCode, CODE_ID AS code, DETAIL_CODE_ID AS detailCode, DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS detailCodeName, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn FROM tb_detail_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code}) AND TRIM(DETAIL_CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{detailCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_detail_code SET DETAIL_CODE_NAME = #{detailCodeName}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, DEL_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM', MOD_DATE = NOW() WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code}) AND TRIM(DETAIL_CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{detailCode})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_detail_code WHERE TRIM(CODE_GROUP_ID) = TRIM(#{groupCode}) AND TRIM(CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{code}) AND TRIM(DETAIL_CODE_ID) = TRIM(#{detailCode})
mapper.update: /* tb_code 순서 재정렬 */ UPDATE tb_code c JOIN ( SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CODE_GROUP_ID ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, CODE_ID) AS new_order FROM tb_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ) r ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = r.CODE_GROUP_ID AND c.CODE_ID = r.CODE_ID SET c.SORT_ORDER = r.new_order

/* tb_detail_code 순서 재정렬 */ UPDATE tb_detail_code c JOIN ( SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE_ID, DETAIL_CODE_ID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE_ID ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, DETAIL_CODE_ID) AS new_order FROM tb_detail_code WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ) r ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = r.CODE_GROUP_ID AND c.CODE_ID = r.CODE_ID AND c.DETAIL_CODE_ID = r.DETAIL_CODE_ID SET c.SORT_ORDER = r.new_order
